claim: The deployable difficulty-estimator family (any label-free sigma(x) or conditional-quantile method) CANNOT close the large-effect conditional-coverage gap on the committed donor-blocked LODO pipeline. The oracle (true-magnitude) Mondrian conformal predictor bounds the attainable bin-conditional-coverage ceiling; the residual gap between the best DEPLOYABLE method and this oracle is an INFORMATION LIMIT (no admissible covariate tracks the conditioning variable), not a method deficiency.

committed_pipeline_frozen.folds_source: data/interim/lodo_surface_cache.pkl (frozen cached folds; X,y,gene,cond per fold)
committed_pipeline_frozen.split: donor-blocked leave-one-donor-out (4 folds); calib=pairs excluding donor d, test=pairs containing d
committed_pipeline_frozen.target: y = log1p(||trans-effect zscore||, on-target excluded); admissible features X = [log_baseMean, condition one-hot]

decision_rule_information_limit_establis.no_if: the deployable family closes the gap (best_deployable within bootstrap CI of oracle_ceiling) OR features predict |resid| (r2_features CI lower > 0.05)
decision_rule_information_limit_establis.partial_if: most but not all of the above hold
yes_if_ALL: break_confirmed < 0.75 AND its bootstrap 95% CI upper < nominal 0.90
r2_features_to_resid bootstrap 95% CI upper < 0.05 AND r2_trueeffect_to_resid > 0.8
every deployable difficulty_top20_capture 95% CI overlaps 0.20 (none meaningfully separates the hard stratum), while oracle capture 95% CI lower > 0.40

hypotheses_directional.H1_break: break_confirmed < 0.90 (baseline under-covers the large-effect stratum); prior-reported ~0.598
hypotheses_directional.H2_deployable_ceiling: best_deployable = cqr_deployable and < oracle_ceiling; prior-reported CQR ~0.73
hypotheses_directional.H4_information_limit: r2_features_to_resid ~= 0 (bootstrap CI upper < 0.05) while r2_trueeffect_to_resid > 0.8 and corr_resid_effect ~ 0.99
hypotheses_directional.H5_all_scores_random: every deployable difficulty_top20_capture is within the random-chance band (~0.20), while oracle capture >> 0.20

inference.bootstrap: gene-cluster bootstrap (resample unique perturbed genes with replacement, take all their rows) B=1000, seed=20260711, to respect the non-independence of recurring perturbations across donor-pairs; 95% percentile CIs on every metric
inference.honesty_contract: This is a NEGATIVE / LIMIT result reported AS an honest null. No metric will be tuned after unblinding. The committed pipeline is scored, not a surrogate.

metrics_defined_before_scoring.attainability_gap: oracle_ceiling - best_deployable (the certified un-closable residual gap)
metrics_defined_before_scoring.best_deployable: max top-stratum coverage over {baseline, mondrian_pred, normalized, cqr}
metrics_defined_before_scoring.break_confirmed: top-stratum coverage of BASELINE global split-conformal at nominal 0.90 (marginal-valid method; expected to UNDER-cover)
metrics_defined_before_scoring.corr_resid_effect: Pearson corr(|residual|, |y - median(y)|) pooled across test rows
metrics_defined_before_scoring.cqr_deployable: top-stratum coverage of CQR (best deployable) at nominal 0.90
metrics_defined_before_scoring.difficulty_top20_capture: for each of 6 deployable difficulty scores {feature meta-model, deep meta-model, kNN residual density, ensemble disagreement, predicted magnitude, feature leverage}: fraction of top-stratum rows that fall in the top-20% of the score. Random-chance floor = 0.20. Oracle |resid| ~ 0.60.
metrics_defined_before_scoring.oracle_ceiling: top-stratum coverage of mondrian_oracle (bins by TRUE y; NON-deployable ceiling) at nominal 0.90
metrics_defined_before_scoring.r2_features_to_resid: honest 5-fold out-of-fold CV R2 of HGBR(admissible X -> |residual|), pooled across LODO test rows
metrics_defined_before_scoring.r2_trueeffect_to_resid: R2 of |residual| explained by TRUE effect magnitude y (in-sample OLS on pooled test rows)

prior_art_exhausted: Papadopoulos, Gammerman, Vovk (2008) normalized nonconformity measures
Lei, G'Sell, Rinaldo, Tibshirani, Wasserman (2018, JASA) locally-weighted/normalized CP
Vovk et al. (2003), Vovk (2012) Mondrian / conditional-validity CP
Barber, Candes, Ramdas, Tibshirani (2019/2021) limits of distribution-free conditional coverage
project: calibrated-trust layer for CD4+ T-cell Perturb-seq (T1D)
status: PRE-REGISTERED BEFORE SCORING (honesty contract: negative/limit result)

stratum_definition.binning: per-fold quintile bins (k=5) of test-set true y; 'top stratum' = highest quintile
stratum_definition.coverage_measured: pooled over the 4 LODO folds within the top true-effect stratum
stratum_definition.note: This is the exact stratum on which marginal-valid CP is disclosed to break.

title: Conditional-coverage ATTAINABILITY certificate for the large-effect coverage break
